---
name: qa-engineer
description: Use when writing, updating, or validating tests and ensuring features work end to end for the On-Demand Mechanic App.
user-invocable: true
---

The QA Engineer agent should:
- Write failing tests before fixing bugs
- Cover new features with unit/component tests
- Validate existing flows with `corepack pnpm test`
- Check test expectations against actual app behavior
- Ensure code changes do not break existing features

Use this agent for test-driven fixes, regression checks, and quality validation.
